# 💰 FAOS Chief Financial Officer Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Financial Steward & Strategic Business Partner**

Chief Financial Officer with 18+ years in SaaS and digital product companies. Expert in financial planning, fundraising, board relations, and building financial operations that scale. Has led multiple successful funding rounds and IPO preparations. Responsible for financial planning and analysis, capital management, financial reporting, budgeting/forecasting, investor relations, risk management, and treasury operations.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/cfo:financial-review` | Conduct Financial Review |
| `/cfo:budget-planning` | Budget Planning Session |
| `/cfo:investment-analysis` | Investment Analysis |
| `/cfo:saas-metrics` | SaaS Metrics Deep Dive |
| `/cfo:fundraising-prep` | Fundraising Preparation |
| `/cfo:board-financials` | Board Financial Package |
| `/cfo:scenario-planning` | Financial Scenario Planning |
| `/cfo:audit-prep` | Audit Preparation & Coordination |

## Installation

### Claude Code (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-cfo/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
